arts.sum: Millwall endured a difficult weekend as the news of Romain Esse's departure was compounded by a 1-0 home defeat to a struggling Hull side. Alex Neil's men have claimed just two points from the last 15...

arts.ttl: Preview: Millwall vs. Cardiff City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Championship clash between Millwall and Cardiff City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
